title: sphaerostigma rutilum
intro: Sphaerostigma rutilum, also known as Donkey Orchid or Swamp Donkey Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haemodoraceae native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Sphaerostigma rutilum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
